title: Remove marked footer sections and add Privacy Policy page

requirements.text: Remove all marked footer link columns from the Footer component. Specifically, remove the following sections entirely: the column at div[2] (with its h4 heading and all list items including li[1], li[3], li[4]), the column at div[3] (with its h4 heading and all list items including li[2], li[3], li[4]), the column at div[4] (with its h4 heading and all list items including li[1], li[2], li[4]), and the column at div[5] (with its h4 heading and all list items including li[2], li[3], li[4]). Clean up any remaining empty containers after removal.

quotes: Remove all that i have marked

acceptanceCriteria: All marked heading and list item elements under footer div[2]/div[1]/div[2], div[3], div[4], and div[5] are removed from the DOM
No empty column wrappers or orphaned headings remain in the footer navigation area
The footer still renders correctly with remaining content (logo, social icons, copyright)

requirements.text: Create a Privacy Policy page as a new React component at frontend/src/components/PrivacyPolicy.tsx. The page should include standard privacy policy sections: Introduction, Information We Collect, How We Use Your Information, Data Sharing and Disclosure, Cookies, Data Retention, User Rights, Security, Children's Privacy, Changes to This Policy, and Contact Information. Style it consistently with the existing site theme (dark background, OKLCH color tokens, Poppins/Inter fonts, Tailwind classes). Include the Navbar and Footer.
acceptanceCriteria: A Privacy Policy page component exists and renders without errors
The page contains all standard privacy policy sections with readable body text
Visual styling (colors, fonts, spacing) is consistent with the rest of the site
The page includes the shared Navbar and Footer components

requirements.text: Add a route or conditional rendering mechanism in App.tsx to display the Privacy Policy page. Add a 'Privacy Policy' link in the footer's bottom bar (near the copyright notice) that navigates to or reveals the Privacy Policy page.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Privacy Policy' link is visible in the footer bottom bar
Clicking the link navigates to or renders the Privacy Policy page
Navigating back returns the user to the landing page

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/components/ui
Only remove the specifically marked elements — do not alter other footer content such as the logo, social media icons, or copyright notice
nonGoals: Adding a backend privacy policy storage or consent tracking system
Modifying any non-footer page sections (Hero, Features, HowItWorks, Stats, AppPreview)
